sevenDay.synopsis: LIFR cigs and fog will improve by 09-10L, giving way to a VFR PM. Like yesterday, showers and ISOLD TS will fire up during the PM period, abating by sunset. Tomorrow looks all clear, but rain chances return for Good Friday and into Easter Weekend. Cigs set up Sunday AM ahead of an incoming frontal boundary, which will bring another burst of showers/TS. We'll start next week with VFR skies, but low-end rain chances will linger thru Monday as a piece of energy moves across the N Gulf.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 01 APR - 07 APR
